items.title_en: Best Buy beats on top and bottom lines as retailer aims to reinvigorate sales

items.desc_en: Confirmed death toll climbs to 2 from Longview paper mill disaster  Oregon Public Broadcasting - OPB1 confirmed dead, 9 missing in chemical tank rupture at Nippon Dynawave pulp and paper mill in Longv
items.desc_zh: 朗维尤造纸厂灾难中确认的死亡人数攀升至 2 人俄勒冈州公共广播 - 朗维尤 Nippon Dynawave 纸浆造纸厂化学罐破裂，OPB1 确认死亡，9 人失踪

items.title_en: Israel orders evacuation of Lebanese city as conflict with Hezbollah escalates
items.title_zh: 由于与真主党的冲突升级，以色列下令撤离黎巴嫩城市
items.desc_en: Israel's military tells residents of Tyre it will "act forcefully" against the armed group, after another wave of strikes in south and east Lebanon.
items.desc_zh: 在黎巴嫩南部和东部发动另一波袭击后，以色列军方告诉提尔居民，将“采取强有力的行动”打击该武装组织。

items.title_en: Five people found alive after week trapped in flooded Laos cave
items.title_zh: 老挝洞穴被淹一周后，五人被发现生还
items.desc_en: The search is continuing for a further two villagers who are still missing, rescuers say.
items.desc_zh: 救援人员称，对另外两名仍然失踪的村民的搜寻仍在继续。

items.title_en: Ebola-hit DR Congo faces 'catastrophic collision' of disease and conflict, WHO warns
items.title_zh: 世卫组织警告称，遭受埃博拉病毒袭击的刚果民主共和国面临疾病与冲突的“灾难性碰撞”
items.desc_en: Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus said fighting in DR Congo was hampering efforts to stop spread
items.desc_zh: 谭德塞表示，刚果民主共和国的战斗阻碍了阻止疫情蔓延的努力

items.title_en: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings
items.title_zh: 色情公司因年龄检查失败被 Ofcom 罚款 60 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，Youngtek Solutions Ltd 在 2025 年 7 月至 9 月期间没有进行检查，但此后进行了验证。

items.title_en: Woman caught after 30 years on the run is jailed for armed robberies
items.title_zh: 女子逃亡30年后被捕，因持械抢劫被判入狱
items.desc_en: Klette was finally caught in a flat in Berlin in 2024 after more than 30 years on the run and put on trial last year.
items.desc_zh: 经过 30 多年的逃亡，克莱特终于于 2024 年在柏林的一套公寓中被捕，并于去年接受审判。

items.title_en: Chinese dissident found at sea detained in South Korea - DW.com
items.title_zh: 中国异见人士在韩国海上被发现并被拘留 - DW.com
items.desc_en: Chinese dissident found at sea detained in South Korea  DW.comDissident escapes China by inflatable boat in fourth attempt to reunite with family  CNNChinese Dissident Braves 30-Hour Rubber Boat Journ
items.desc_zh: 中国持不同政见者在韩国海上被发现被拘留 DW.com 持不同政见者第四次乘充气船逃离中国，试图与家人团聚 CNN 中国持不同政见者勇敢的 30 小时橡皮艇之旅

items.title_en: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
items.title_zh: 道德黑客冠军警告像 Mythos 这样的人工智能工具可能会让她破产
items.desc_en: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.
items.desc_zh: Chompie 是世界顶级道德黑客之一，她表示像 Claude Mythos 这样的人工智能将使像她这样的人更难竞争。

items.title_en: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
items.title_zh: 凯恩和哈兰德的 Instagram 投注广告被禁止
items.desc_en: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
items.desc_zh: 广告监管机构表示，以顶级足球运动员为主角的广告对 18 岁以下青少年有很强的吸引力。

items.title_en: Three killed and dozens injured in Israeli strike on Gaza City, medics and witnesses say
items.title_zh: 医务人员和目击者称，以色列对加沙城的袭击造成三人死亡、数十人受伤
items.desc_en: Israel says it was targeting a Hamas commander whose predecessor was killed in a similar strike earlier in May.
items.desc_zh: 以色列表示，其目标是一名哈马斯指挥官，该指挥官的前任在五月初的一次类似袭击中被杀。

items.title_en: Government vows to bring in under-16 social media restrictions by end of year
items.title_zh: 政府誓言年底前对 16 岁以下儿童实施社交媒体限制
items.desc_en: Tech minister Liz Kendall told the BBC the government would publish a response to the consultation in the summer.
items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。

items.title_en: The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard
items.title_zh: 味道像奶油冻的水果的兴起
items.desc_en: Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.
items.desc_zh: 番荔枝植物因其耐寒性而受到重视，但出口其精致的果实却很困难。

items.desc_zh: 几秒钟内生成的品牌演示

items.title_en: From decades to years - AI could speed search for brain drugs hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 从几十年到几年——人工智能可以加速寻找隐藏在视线中的大脑药物
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望这项工作将有助于找到负担得起的、有效的药物来治疗 MND 等疾病。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。
